subject: Sports
title: The Golden State Warriors Dynasty
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Golden State Warriors Dynasty.

hook.text: They changed how basketball is played. The Warriors proved that shooting could beat size.

buildup.text: Stephen Curry, Klay Thompson, and Draymond Green formed a core that won four titles from 2015 to 2022.

discovery.text: Their 2015-16 team went 73-9, breaking the Bulls' record—then lost the Finals in a historic collapse.

twist.text: Kevin Durant joined the next season. The Warriors became so dominant that critics called the league boring.

climax.text: Their small-ball, three-point-heavy style became the NBA's default blueprint for a generation.

punchline.text: They made every team in the league start shooting threes.

quiz.question: How many NBA titles did the Warriors dynasty win?
